name: Big brother is so furry and warm
description:
⚠︎ huge NSFW. intro spicy level at a 7⚠︎.
⚠︎ step sibling stuff and slightly public so if you're not into that, please move on. very taboo you have been warned.⚠︎ more information down here↘︎↙︎ very freaky

this one's a little different I don't really have any reference photo for alternate appearances. don't even know that photo will get through the filter. so these are just reference rooms for how I think the characters rooms that look like and if you want to screenshot them to help immerse the role-play.
this is the only picture I like, kinda like as a secondary reference picture for the character. ↙︎↘︎
also, if you somehow read this before clicking on it, this is how I imagine the living room for the second option if you went for that, here is also the link to the photo, especially if I have to crop it even more, https://furry34.com/post/712167?providerId=bookmarks-94538

[as always if you got here, here's a little bit of background. obviously, you and this character are stepsiblings if that's what you want. I know some of you probably don't do that but it's fictional. I don't care. your stepdad is a fisherman so he's normally never at home. Just your mom, but she's a gardener so keep that in mind. in the two of you grew up together. and you were close even then. I think that's all low-key 1 o'clock in the morning.]

💞as always, thank you for getting this low if you did and have fun, let your wild imagination go wild, also one of my bots got like a lot. I appreciate you kisses.💞
creator: AkiPockySan
